member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.CrossFirebaseCrashlytics.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets if the plugin is supported on the current platform.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics
member.summary: Firebase Crashlytics is a lightweight, realtime crash reporter that helps you track, prioritize, and fix stability issues that erode your app quality.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCrashlyticsCollectionEnabled(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables the automatic data collection configuration for Crashlytics
member.param: Whether to enable or disable automatic data collection

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCustomKey(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets a custom key and value that are associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A value to be associated with the given key

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCustomKey(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets a custom key and value that are associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A value to be associated with the given key

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCustomKey(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Sets a custom key and value that are associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A value to be associated with the given key

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCustomKey(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets a custom key and value that are associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A value to be associated with the given key

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCustomKey(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Sets a custom key and value that are associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A value to be associated with the given key

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCustomKey(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a custom key and value that are associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A value to be associated with the given key

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetCustomKeys(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Sets multiple custom keys and values that are associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A dictionary of keys and the values to associate with each key

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SetUserId(System.String)
member.summary: Records a user ID (identifier) that's associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
member.param: A unique identifier for the current user

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message that's included in the next fatal, non-fatal, or ANR report.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.RecordException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Records a non-fatal report to send to Crashlytics.
member.param: An exception to be recorded as a non-fatal event.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.DidCrashOnPreviousExecution
member.summary: Checks whether the app crashed on its previous run.
member.returns: True if a crash was recorded during the previous run of the app.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.CheckForUnsentReportsAsync
member.summary: Checks a device for any fatal crash, non-fatal error, or ANR reports that haven't yet been sent to Crashlytics.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.SendUnsentReports
member.summary: If automatic data collection is disabled, this method queues up all the reports on a device to send to Crashlytics. Otherwise, this method is a no-op.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Crashlytics.IFirebaseCrashlytics.DeleteUnsentReports
member.summary: If automatic data collection is disabled, this method queues up all the reports on a device for deletion. Otherwise, this method is a no-op.
